goal: is_continuum_real_set(s) = (not s.is_empty and is_compact_real_set(s) and is_connected_real_set(s))

p.c: function(x0: Set[Real]) { (not x0.is_empty and is_compact_real_set(x0) and is_connected_real_set(x0)) = is_continuum_real_set(x0) }(s)

goal: is_continuum_real_set(s) = (not s.is_empty and is_compact_real_set(s) and is_connected_real_set(s))

p.c: function(x0: Set[Real]) { (not x0.is_empty and is_compact_real_set(x0) and is_connected_real_set(x0)) = is_continuum_real_set(x0) }(s)

goal: is_continuum_real_set(s) = (not s.is_empty and is_compact_real_set(s) and is_connected_real_set(s))

p.c: function(x0: Set[Real]) { (not x0.is_empty and is_compact_real_set(x0) and is_connected_real_set(x0)) = is_continuum_real_set(x0) }(s)
function(x0: Set[Real]) { (not x0.is_empty and is_compact_real_set(x0) and is_connected_real_set(x0)) = is_continuum_real_set(x0) }(s)
function(x0: Set[Real]) { not is_compact_real_set(x0) or not is_connected_real_set(x0) or x0.is_empty or is_continuum_real_set(x0) }(Set.singleton(a))
function[T0](x0: Set[T0]) { forall(x1: T0) { not x1 ∈ x0 } = x0.is_empty }[Real](closed_interval_set(lower, upper))
not closed_interval_set(lower, upper).is_empty or forall(x0: Real) { not x0 ∈ closed_interval_set(lower, upper) } = true
(forall(x0: Real) { not x0 ∈ closed_interval_set(lower, upper) or not closed_interval_set(lower, upper).is_empty })
not forall(x0: Real) { not x0 ∈ closed_interval_set(lower, upper) } or closed_interval_set(lower, upper).is_empty
function(x0: Real) { not x0 ∈ closed_interval_set(lower, upper) }(lower)
function(x0: Set[Real]) { not is_compact_real_set(x0) or not is_connected_real_set(x0) or x0.is_empty or is_continuum_real_set(x0) }(closed_interval_set(lower, upper))
function(x0: Set[Real]) { not is_compact_real_set(x0) or not is_connected_real_set(x0) or x0.is_empty or is_continuum_real_set(x0) }(s ∩ t)
